title: The Duel in the Mirror World
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Nami, Unknown person #11, Katakuri, Unknown person #12 as Luffy and Katakuri push their duel to its emotional peak while Sanji moves the cake plan toward the escape route.
scene: Luffy and Katakuri turn their fight into a battle of respect, endurance, and future sight.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The meeting time is 1 am tonight.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Search for the mirror that leads to cacao Island!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Huff... huff... what time... is it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Huff... someday... Will you... come back here...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am the man... who will be the pirate king!!!

summary: This section advances the Luffy vs Katakuri storyline with 29 dialogue beats. Luffy and Katakuri push each other beyond technique, turning the fight into a test of conviction.
